steps.title: Compare the slopes
steps.content:
Rewrite each equation in slope-intercept form.
$$3x+y=13$$
$$y=-3x+13$$
$$4x-y=15$$
$$y=4x-15$$

steps.title: Count the intersections
steps.content: The slopes $-3$ and $4$ are different, so the lines intersect at exactly one point.

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: Graphing the two lines shows one intersection, matching the slope comparison. The answer is A.
